summarization.a: The chart shows the relationship between temperature (T °C) and the thickness and mass increment per cycle, experimentally measured and calculated using minimum and extended mechanisms.

a.question: Can the different extended mechanisms be used to fit the experimental data points?
a.answer: a	The points fall in the range of the extended model and can therefore be fitted with such a model.

a.question: Why are there no data points for low processing temperatures?
a.answer: a	There probably is a minimum temperature as the source temperature has to be lower than the processing temperature, but high enough to evaporate the precursor.

a.question: According to the model, what is the highest achievable growth rate?
Gives the model in general a higher or lower value than the experimental values?
a.answer: a	Except for some outliers in general the model overestimates the experimental data, even when considering the error bars.
